_comment: Owner profile — the skull's personalization. The setup wizard writes this file into OMEGA7_DATA_DIR as owner.json. Every field is optional; omit or blank anything you don't want to share. With no owner.json present, the skull works fully and simply learns about you through conversation.
name: Your Name
interests: Free text — hobbies and games you enjoy (e.g. 'plays Warhammer 40k and enjoys sci-fi novels').
family: Free text — people in your life (e.g. 'Partner named Alex, dog named Rex').
occupation: Free text — what you do (e.g. 'Works as a software engineer').
rapport: Free text — how the skull should treat you (e.g. 'Warm and encouraging, with occasional dry wit').
